schema.description:
Serializer for provisioning Click to Pay configuration.

This is used before actual payment to provide configuration to the frontend.

pg_code.description: Payment Gateway code selected for Click to Pay.

session_id.description: Session ID used to identify the transaction.

schema.title: SubmitClickToPay
